title: [CI:DOCS] fix: podman-system-service doc time is seconds
body:
Podman man page states --time argument is in milliseconds, however it behaves as seconds.

https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/cdc50e9d195f8081d3a5dc69cc65ddd3f050497c/cmd/podman/system/service.go#L51

comments.body:
Thanks @manusa, but you need to sign your PR.

git commit -a --amend -s
git push --force

LGTM
I'm really sorry :pray: . For some reason I only read the first section of the CONTRIBUTING guidelines :sweat_smile: .
